---
description: >-
  Run a technical UI audit covering accessibility, performance, tokens,
  responsiveness, and anti-patterns
---

# Design Audit

Audit the requested UI without editing code by default.

User input: $ARGUMENTS

## Checks

1. Accessibility
2. Performance
3. Theming and token usage
4. Responsiveness
5. Anti-pattern detection

## Output

1. Score table
2. P0-P3 issues
3. Positive findings
4. Recommended next commands
